overview: An AI-powered data explorer that lets users upload CSV or JSON files and ask natural language questions to get instant insights, summaries, rankings, and visualizations — no manual analysis needed.
features: Upload CSV or JSON files via drag-and-drop or file picker
Natural language query input for data exploration
Text summaries for filtered results and rankings
Bar charts for comparisons and pie charts for distributions
Query history sidebar for current session
Data preview showing column names and inferred types
Loading states, error handling, and empty state guidance
